titleStmt.title: SII 9.659: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 659. (A.R. No. 392 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF A HOUSE TO THE EAST OF THE TANK, DEVARAKERE, AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1477, Rākshasa, Kārtika, śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1555 October 16, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that while Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka was the governor of Tuḷu-rājya under the orders of the king, and that under the latter's orders Mallappoḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, Kōṭīsaraseṭṭi, grandson of Śaṅkara Haḍupāḷe of Baḷābaḷi, a resident of Basarūru, made a grant of land for maintaining the sattra attached to his maṭha. The record is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra cāmaracāriṇē . (.) trayi
lōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1477 saṁ
du varttamāna rākṣasasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 1 Ārabhya śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa sadāśivamahārāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadali cittavisi saka
la sāṁmrujyavanāḷutaṁviha kāladali Avara nirūpadiṁda sadāśivarāyanāyakaru tuḷurājya
va māḍikoṁḍu Avara nirūpadiṁda mallappoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū pratipālisutiha kāladalli . basa
rūra paḍuvakēriya baḷābaḷiya śaṁkarahaḍupāḷeya moṁmaga kōṭīsaraseṭṭi taṁna maṭhada chatrake biṭṭa bāḷina
vivara kavilakeyya vola kunūravoḷage kōṭīsaraseṭṭiya mūlada bāḷa catusīme mūḍalu holana vottina baca
lagaḍi voḷage vola kunūra dēvara dēvasvada nālku hāḷi horatāgi bacala gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu taṁkalu nāgume
raṭana kaṁbaḷa gadde huruvara dareyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍavalu hariharaseṭiya vōṇiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu baḍagalu sēnabōvakkaḷa beḷugalla makki gaḍiyiṁda muṁḍagara baccaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku
catusīme voḷage bittuva bayalu nā mu 12 makki mu 12 hakalu haḍu maṁdu mara phala sahavāgi mēlu ba
yalu voḷage mū harida baccaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu nāguseṭi gadde gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu harida ba
caliṁdaṁ mūḍalu bē Aṁṇuseṭiya gaddeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo nālu gaḍiyiṁdoḷage ba hā 2 ke nā
mu 1 hā 20 �yo bāḷige Aṁṇuseṭṭi hadiyalū teruva teru mu 1 ke ga ¥ 3 . lkedalu bayalige tetu baha dha
rmmaṁ kuṁdāpurada bra(ṁ)hmara Ādhivāsadoḷage dēmakāraṁtana maga nāraṇakāraṁtana mūla Ā kōṭīsa
raseṭiya Aḷiya ti(ṁ)mmayaseṭi Āruvāravu māḍikoṁḍa bāḷa mū 1 nāraṇakāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ pa teṁ Aliṁdaṁ ba pa
bhaṭṭakāraṁtana gaḍiyaṁ mū . ba . cippi Āgaraupādhyara dēmakāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁ teṁ �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage ba nā mu 3
nā mu 3 kaḷiyavoḷage . mū . heraḷakkaḷa Āgarada kaṁṭhada gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . bācaṇakāraṁtana makkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ ba
śaṁbhukāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ mū . ba . hosamaneya Upādhyara gaḍiyiṁ teṁ . nā mu 1 hā 10 kallabāgadoḷage
mū hoḷeyiṁ pa . dēmakāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ ba . cippi Agara Upādhya gaḍiyiṁ mū . śaṁkara heraḷa gaḍiyiṁ
tu 3 baḷi Agara sahitavāgi koṭṭa Ārdhakāṭi ga 80 . ke doḍḍavaraha ga 32 yidakke naḍa Akki nāghaṁḍu
mu 5 hā 20 mattaṁ dēmakāraṁtara maga viṣṇukāraṁtanū mayisāla do varaha ga 5 ke baḍḍi Akki nā
mu 1 hā 4 vāsudēvakāraṁtara maga kruṣṇakāraṁta mayisālava tegedukoṁ va ga 2 . 0 baḍḍi Akki mu
hā 22 dēmakāraṁtara magakruṣṇakāraṁta tegedukoṁ mayisāla doḍḍava ga 7 ¥ 2 . yidake
baḍi Aki nāghaṁ mu 1 hā 24 Aṁtu 3 ke kōṭīsaraseṭi koṭa vara ga 14 . 1 yidakeStops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.659 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
